messages.achievement.v_ac_ch1_coward.title: Who are you calling a coward?
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch1_coward.caption: A true warrior never backs down from a challenge.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch1_die.title: Off to a good start
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch1_die.caption: Died before reaching the first checkpoint.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch1_honesty.title: Honesty is the best policy.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch1_honesty.caption: A clean mouth and an honest hand will take a man through any land.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_talker.title: Smooth talker
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_talker.caption: Choosing the right words at the right time can be a daunting task for many, but you make it look so easy.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_nails.title: Tough as nails
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_nails.caption: Got stabbed in the neck with a dagger and lived to tell the tale.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_master.title: Martial arts master
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_master.caption: Successfully disarmed an opponent while fighting barehanded.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_unlikely.title: An unlikely ally
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch2_unlikely.caption: Sometimes, friends can come from the most unexpected places.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch3_message.title: A message in the sky
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch3_message.caption: It's a beautiful night for stargazing, don't you think?
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch3_army.title: One man army
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch3_army.caption: Singlehandedly defeated a small army of one hundred armed men, as well as their leader.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch3_close.title: That was close!
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch3_close.caption: Saved a friend in the nick of time from an incoming dart.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch4_noble.title: A noble sacrifice
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch4_noble.caption: Gave your own life to save a friend's.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch4_cutthroat.title: Defeated Cutthroat Dave
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch4_cutthroat.caption: Won a duel against Cutthroat Dave.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch4_kneed.title: I really kneed a break!
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch4_kneed.caption: Break both of your knees from a fall.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_wielder.title: Stat device wielder
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_wielder.caption: Upon lending the stat device to Daren, you make an unexpected discovery.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_liar.title: Admitted liar
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_liar.caption: Sometimes you just have to grab the bull by the horns.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_deed.title: A good deed
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_deed.caption: Even a small act of selflessness can go a long way.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_shameless.title: Shameless
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch5_shameless.caption: Take the credit for someone else's deeds, without any shame.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch6_tyrath.title: Defeated Tyrath
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch6_tyrath.caption: Won a duel against Tyrath, the king of all dragons.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch6_berserker.title: Berserker mode activated
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch6_berserker.caption: Accidentally maximized all of your stats in a fit of rage.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch6_immersion.title: Full immersion
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch6_immersion.caption: Experience what your in-game character sees, first hand.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch7_answer.title: Violence is not the answer
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch7_answer.caption: Why bother to fight, if you can just bluff your way to victory?
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch7_crusher.title: Golem crusher
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch7_crusher.caption: Destroy at least one rock golem by yourself in a fight.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch7_hadrik.title: Defeated Hadrik
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch7_hadrik.caption: Won a duel against Hadrik.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch8_democratie.title: Vive la democratie!
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch8_democratie.caption: Win a democratic vote by a small margin.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch8_first.title: First piece of the puzzle
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch8_first.caption: Find the first piece of the puzzle made by Varathia's greatest architect.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch8_hydra.title: Hydra slayer
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch8_hydra.caption: Kill a hydra with your own hands.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch9_observer.title: Keen observer
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch9_observer.caption: When inside enemy territory, you should always mind your surroundings.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch9_decision.title: A wise decision
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch9_decision.caption: Throwing away your pride is never easy, but sometimes there is no other way.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch10_shaman.title: Defeated ogre shaman
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch10_shaman.caption: Won a duel against the shaman from the ogre stronghold.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch10_toast.title: A toast!
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch10_toast.caption: Shared a drink with Hadrik to celebrate your most recent victory.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch10_reunion.title: A touching reunion
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch10_reunion.caption: Helped Rose make up with an old friend.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_symbol.title: A mysterious symbol
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_symbol.caption: Discover a strange marking engraved on the side of a harmless toy.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_stillwater.title: Stillwater slayer
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_stillwater.caption: Defeated five stillwaters all by yourself.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_casualties.title: No casualties
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_casualties.caption: No members of your group died in the first book.
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_average.title: Average Joe
messages.achievement.v_ac_ch11_average.caption: Finished the first book without leveling up a single stat.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_news.title: Bearer of bad news
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_news.caption: Volunteer to take the role that nobody else wants to take.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_distance.title: Long-distance
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_distance.caption: Find out the reason why Daren decided to create his enchanted transceivers.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_second.title: Second piece of the puzzle
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_second.caption: Find the second piece of the puzzle made by Varathia's greatest architect.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_breed.title: Half-breed
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch1_breed.caption: Find out an interesting detail about your lineage.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_bro.title: Come at me, bro!
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_bro.caption: Take all of your opponent's hits head-on, instead of trying to defend yourself.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_easy.title: The easy way out
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_easy.caption: Accept the help of a shady individual, without lying to him, in exchange for making your life easier in the arena.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_wall.title: Fourth wall breaker
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_wall.caption: Make a reference that your game character would have no way of knowing without breaking the fourth wall.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_griffin.title: Griffin rider
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch2_griffin.caption: Ride a griffin and live to tell the tale.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch3_enemy.title: Once an enemy, now an ally
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch3_enemy.caption: Convince an enemy troll to join your side.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch3_cage.title: The golden cage
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch3_cage.caption: Find out why Illuna can cast the spirit fox's golden cage.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_player.title: Not a team player
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_player.caption: Get two of the members from your division killed, through your actions.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_intimidation.cap: Manage to avoid an assassination attempt by intimidating your adversary into not attacking you.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_hadrik.title: Hadrik saves the day!
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_hadrik.caption: Witness Hadrik's second fight in the arena.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_risk.title: A calculated risk
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_risk.caption: Sometimes it's better to take small risks than to go the extra mile just to be completely certain.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_trampler.title: Trampler slayer
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_trampler.caption: Defeat two tramplers by yourself.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_spear.title: Spear thrower
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_spear.caption: Kill a manticore in mid-flight, by throwing a spear at it.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_stats.title: Who needs stats?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_stats.caption: Win the first round of the arena without any points in your stats, and without help from the scythe wielding lessathi.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_time.title: Time stop
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_time.caption: Witness Rose subconsciously casting a time freezing spell, for the first time.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_motive.title: The assassin's motive
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch4_motive.caption: Find out the assassin's reason for wanting to kill you in the arena.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_tribal.title: Tribal dancer
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_tribal.caption: Perform a tribal dance while dodging pillars of fire.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_divide.title: Divide and conquer
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_divide.caption: Win against the troll by turning his own allies against him.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_speaker.title: Public speaker
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_speaker.caption: Hold a speech in front of the arena crowds, after one of your victories.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_united.title: United we stand
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch5_united.caption: Get Wilhelm and the gladiator that you fight against in the third round to join your team in the bonus round.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch6_secret.title: Secret code discovered
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch6_secret.caption: Learn about a secret code that gives you a temporary bonus to your Hearing stat.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch6_edge.title: Living on the edge
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch6_edge.caption: Expend most of your budget with a single purchase.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_average.title: Just an average assassin
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_average.caption: Complete king Golmyck's mission without having any points invested in your stats.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_culprit.title: Found the culprit
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_culprit.caption: Find out who sabotaged Golmyck's telepathic message device.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_delivered.title: Message delivered
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_delivered.captio: Deliver Eiden's still winter message to its rightful recipients.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_cookie.title: Message delivered
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch7_cookie.caption: Survive the powerful grip of a giant stone hand, without getting crushed.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_trivia.title: Stillwater trivia
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_trivia.caption: Find out important information about the stillwaters, and their origins.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_savior.title: Unexpected savior
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_savior.caption: When you are in a pinch, help does not always come from where you'd expect.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_tree.title: Tree wielder
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_tree.caption: Who needs weapons, when you can just use trees as clubs?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_effects.title: Side effects
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_effects.caption: Experience first-hand the side effects of your protection spell.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_gentleman.title: A true gentleman
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch8_gentleman.captio: Offer to take an extra night shift, in order to make sure that your lady guest gets a good night's sleep.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_missing.title: Something is missing
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_missing.caption: Does this backpack feel lighter to anyone else, or is it just me?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_helper.title: I'm a helper!
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_helper.caption: Help the animals in the forest to complete their mission.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_king.title: Long live the king!
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_king.caption: Learn a shocking truth about the current state of affairs in Thilias.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_cards.title: Master of cards
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch9_cards.caption: Win a card game against Hadrik.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch10_creative.title: A creative solution
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch10_creative.captio: Not all battles need to be won through fighting.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch10_mammoth.title: Mammoth slayer
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch10_mammoth.caption: Kill a mammoth with your own hands.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch10_demolition.capt: You seem to really enjoy smashing big rocks into one another. Ever thought about doing this for a living?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch10_stalker.title: Stalker detected
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch10_stalker.caption: Do you ever get the feeling that you are being watched?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_supportive.capt: Encourage a friend who just had an epiphany and wants to change their life for the better.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_madman.title: Madman
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_madman.caption: Attack Arraka with a dagger for the second time, and live to tell the tale.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_cutthroat.title: Cutthroat vs god
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_cutthroat.capti: Witness an epic confrontation between a cutthroat and a god.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_average2.title: Average Joe 2
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_average2.captio: Finished the first two books without leveling up a single stat.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_hidden.title: A hidden truth
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_hidden.caption: Find out what happened to Barry's biological parents.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_elephant.title: The elephant in the room
messages.achievement.v_ac_b2_ch11_elephant.captio: There's always that one guy who can't take a hint and who doesn't realize that some things are better left unsaid.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch1_regrets.title: No regrets
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch1_regrets.caption: He who risks nothing can gain nothing.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch1_password.title: Password acquired
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch1_password.caption: You never know when a secret code might come in handy.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_metal.title: Metal golem slayer
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_metal.caption: Kill a large metal golem with your own hands.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_serious.title: Time to get serious
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_serious.caption: Sometimes, you just need to pull out all the stops.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_lie.title: I cannot tell a lie.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_lie.caption: Honest Barry is what they call you.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_reckless.title: Reckless
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch2_reckless.caption: Live up to your new nickname.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_ominous.title: Ominous foreshadowing
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_ominous.caption: Were you perhaps expecting something less vague?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_unexpected.title: An unexpected bonus
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_unexpected.capti: Not all mistakes lead to misfortune.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_job.title: A job well done!
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_job.caption: Congratulations! You managed to find the only death scene in this chapter. (You were doing it on purpose, right?)
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_unforeseen.title: An unforeseen premonition
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch3_unforeseen.capti: Hint: Your stat device will not help you here.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_demolisher.title: Fourth wall demolisher
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_demolisher.capti: Did you ever break the 4th wall so hard that you felt you could almost see through the cracks?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_alliance.title: A hidden alliance
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_alliance.caption: Form a secret alliance with a potential new king of Ollendor.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_deception.title: A master of deception
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_deception.captio: Your quick wit and improvisation skills are second to none. Nobody is better at lying than you.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_thrower.title: Rock throwing champion
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch4_thrower.caption: Defeat a very powerful adversary using only a rock taken from the ground.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch5_opportunist.capt: Why give away anything for free when you can make a small profit instead?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch5_days.title: The good old days
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch5_days.caption: Reenact one of the night shifts from the first days of the tournament.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch5_footsteps.title: I can hear footsteps.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch5_footsteps.captio: Listen carefully. The assassin is getting nearer.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch5_passed.title: Challenge accepted
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch5_passed.caption: Take on a challenge that not many mortals would dare to attempt.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_natural.title: A natural liar
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_natural.caption: Lie so well that you make someone question their own short-term memory.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_assist.title: Nice assist
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_assist.caption: Get help from someone that you've fought against in the past.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_peek.title: Peek-a-boo!
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_peek.caption: Win a very complex game of hide and seek.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_credo.title: An assassin's credo
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_credo.caption: Find out what it means to be a true assassin from a skilled practitioner of the craft.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_guardian.title: Guardian angel
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_guardian.caption: Prevent someone from dying after seeing their death in a vision.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_freeze.title: Time freeze enthusiast
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_freeze.caption: Experience the world being frozen around you two times in the same day.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_curiosity.title: Curiosity killed the cat
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_curiosity.captio: Be honest. Did you really fall for the trap, or were you just aiming to get this achievement?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_average.title: Average is my middle name
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_average.caption: Survive the trip to the surface without having any points invested in your stats.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_quarantine.title: Quarantine ender
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_quarantine.capti: Help Daren save everyone from the quarantine area in the underground tunnels below Ollendor.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_echoes.title: Do you hear an echo?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch6_echoes.caption: Listen to a conversation that is happening at the opposite end of a long underground tunnel.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch7_honorable.title: An honorable victory
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch7_honorable.captio: Defeat Gontrok without taking advantage of his bet with Leila.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch7_sharpshooter.cap: An achievement awarded only to those with unmatched crossbow skills.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch7_paranoid.title: Paranoid
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch7_paranoid.caption: The whole world is out to get you. You can't trust anyone. Not even yourself.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_bluffer.title: Master of bluffing
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_bluffer.caption: Successfully bluff a living lie detector.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_unusual.title: An unusual candidate
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_unusual.caption: Convince Kelrim to become a candidate for the throne of Ollendor.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_heartfelt.title: A heartfelt promise
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_heartfelt.captio: Make a promise with Leila that you will go on adventures together after the end of the tournament.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_friend.title: A friend in need
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch8_friend.caption: Help cheer up a friend when he is feeling down.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_prize.title: Consolation prize
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_prize.caption: A prize awarded for dying more than five times in the same chapter.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_moment.title: An introspective moment
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_moment.caption: Take a moment to self-reflect and think about everything that you've achieved.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_targets.title: High-value targets
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_targets.caption: Defeat Albert, Peter and the king of the underground without asking the Overseer for help.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_trinkets.title: No need for trinkets
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch9_trinkets.caption: Defeat the Overseer without making any use of your stat device.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_benefits.title: Friends with benefits
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_benefits.captio: Agree to enter a relationship with no strings attached with Melindra after the tournament.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_third.title: Third piece of the puzzle
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_third.caption: Find the third piece of the puzzle made by Varathia's greatest architect.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_behind.title: No man left behind
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_behind.caption: Receive confirmation that every prisoner in the seredium towers has been rescued, including Alice's father.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_reasonable.capt: Defuse a hostage situation by remaining calm and collected.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_forbidden.title: Forbidden knowledge
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch10_forbidden.capti: Find out the true nature of the Magium.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch11_fourth.title: Fourth piece of the puzzle
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch11_fourth.caption: Find the fourth piece of the puzzle made by Varathia's greatest architect.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch11_taste.title: A small taste of the big prize
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch11_taste.caption: Use knowledge from the Magium to improve a spell.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch11_aftermath.title: Hidden alliance aftermath
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch11_aftermath.capti: Receive direct confirmation from the Overseer that his plan to free the mage slaves is going smoothly.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_battle.title: Preparing for the big battle
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_battle.caption: Start working on the most important spell to be used against the God of Time.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_hugger.title: Tree-hugger
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_hugger.caption: Become one with nature.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_liar.title: Serial liar
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_liar.caption: Successfully bluff two people in the same chapter and manage to survive.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_dagger.title: One Dagger Man
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_dagger.caption: Survive against a powerful foe, armed with only one dagger.
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_delegator.title: Delegator
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_delegator.capti: Why fight for yourself when you can just have somebody else do it for you?
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_average.title: (more than) Average Joe
messages.achievement.v_ac_b3_ch12_average.caption: Reach the end of the third book without leveling up any stats except your magical stats.
